content: Professional B2B SaaS landing pages answer four above-the-fold questions (is this for me, can it do what I need, is it worth it, can I trust you). Standard section anatomy: hero (H1 under ~8 words, outcome-focused, primary + secondary CTA), social proof/logo strip directly below hero, features organized as a 3-5 step workflow mirroring the customer's process, and a closing CTA section with a low-commitment off-ramp. Trust signals work in two layers: credibility-layer (logos, named customers, usage stats) early on the page; submission-layer (security/privacy statements) near forms and CTAs. Five conversion pillars: relevance, 5-second clarity, trust, friction reduction, clear next step.
